title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
